Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.xprover

Class XProverReasoner2

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.xprover.AbstractXProverReasoner
org.eventb.core.seqprover.xprover.XProverReasoner2
All Implemented Interfaces:
IReasoner
Direct Known Subclasses:
PPReasoner
public abstract class XProverReasoner2 extends AbstractXProverReasoner
Abstract base class for running an external prover as a reasoner.

This class implements the IReasoner interface and provides a skeletal implementation for running an external prover.

To implement a reasoner, clients should extend this class and provide two methods:

  • getReasonerId returns the id of the reasoner,
  • newProverCall returns a new object encapsulating a call of the external prover on a given sequent

Since:
2.4

  • Method Details

    • newProverCall

      public abstract XProverCall2 newProverCall(IReasonerInput input, ISimpleSequent sequent, IProofMonitor pm)
      Returns a new object encapsulating a run of the external prover with the given input.
      Parameters:
      input - the input to this reasoner (can contain additional parameters specific to the external prover)
      sequent - the sequent to prove
      pm - proof monitor (might be null)
      Returns:
      a new call of the external prover
